title: Measurement Disturbance: Information-Disturbance Trade-offs
description: Explore the fundamental trade-off between extracting information from quantum systems and disturbing them. Learn about measurement back-action, the uncertainty principle's operational meaning, and error-disturbance relations.
learningObjectives: Understand measurement back-action as a fundamental quantum phenomenon
Distinguish between reversible and irreversible measurements
Analyze the connection to the uncertainty principle
Apply error-disturbance relations to quantum protocols
